title: 'Swatantryaveer' title of VD Savarkar not conferred by government but appears in his biography: Savarkar's grandnephew tells court
description: A Pune court was on Wednesday informed that the popular honorific “Swatantryaveer” used for Hindutva ideologue Vinayak Damodar Savarkar did not stem from any formal government conferment [Satyaki Savarkar v Rahul Gandhi].Further, there is no documentary proof that it was formally bestowed on him by the people either, it was submitted. This was stated by Savarkar's grandnephew Satyaki Savarkar as part of the evidence in the defamation case filed by him against Leader of Opposition Rahul Gandhi. “
